fields.label: Batch Number
fields.description: Pick any batch of the parent item. Auto-populated batches are read from current Bin (qty > 0); user may also add batches at 0 qty.

fields.label: Select UOM
fields.description: UOM the counter is reporting Qty Found in. Auto-defaults to the item's higher UOM if available, else stock UOM. Affects column 4 (Current Stock in Selected UOM) — that recomputes as stock_qty / conversion_factor.

fields.label: Qty Found
fields.description: Counter's physical-count qty in the chosen UOM. LEAVE BLANK on rows you did not count — those rows are excluded from the ERPNext SR on submit; their current stock is retained as-is.

fields.label: Current Stock (Selected UOM)
fields.description: Current Bin qty for (this batch, this warehouse) ÷ conversion_factor for the selected UOM. Read-only display.

fields.label: Stock UOM
fields.description: Item's stock UOM. Read-only mirror from Item master.

fields.label: Current Stock (Stock UOM)
fields.description: Current Bin qty for (this batch, this warehouse) in the item's stock UOM. The authoritative ledger qty before reconciliation.

fields.label: Item Name
fields.description: Mirror of the parent's Item.item_name. Lets users see the item label on each row without flipping back to the header.

fields.label: Item
fields.description: Auto-populated from parent.item on row add. Read-only — duplicates the parent's item so each child row can be queried independently if needed (e.g., audit JOINs). Visible in row-expand; hidden from the grid to keep it slim.

fields.label: Warehouse
fields.description: Auto-populated from parent.default_warehouse on row add. Read-only by spec — the SRT doc operates on a single warehouse picked at the parent level. Visible in row-expand; hidden from the grid (warehouse is constant within a doc) to keep the grid slim.

fields.label: Conversion Factor
fields.description: Internal: select_uom → stock_uom conversion factor. Hidden — recomputed by JS when select_uom changes.

fields.label: Valuation Rate (Stock UOM)
fields.description: Internal: current Bin valuation rate for this (batch, warehouse). Used to populate the ERPNext SR Item row on submit so the SR posts with the right rate.

fields.label: Do Reconcile
fields.description: Check this box to include the row in the real ERPNext Stock Reconciliation on submit. UNCHECKED rows are ignored — their Qty Found is NOT considered; the batch keeps its current (timestamp) stock in the ledger. The operator must EXPLICITLY tick the box for every batch they actually counted; default state is unchecked.
